query: add a case `{"", ""}` to the cases slice. Don't remove or reorder existing cases.
check: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && cp $FILE $tmp/slug_test.go && printf 'module example.com/slug\ngo 1.21\n' > $tmp/go.mod && (cd $tmp && go test -count=1 -run TestSlugify .) && grep -q '{"", ""}' $FILE

query: wrap each iteration in `t.Run(c.in, func(t *testing.T) { ... })` so failures are reported per subtest. Keep the existing assertion logic. Do not change the cases slice.
check: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && cp $FILE $tmp/slug_test.go && printf 'module example.com/slug\ngo 1.21\n' > $tmp/go.mod && (cd $tmp && go test -count=1 -run 'TestSlugify/hello-world' -v .) | grep -qE 'hello-world|PASS'
